ns0:entry.ns0:title: MHSanaei/3x-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MHSanaei/3x-ui
Language: html
Xray panel supporting multi-protocol multi-user expire day & traffic & IP limit (Vmess, Vless, Trojan, ShadowSocks, Wireguard, Hysteria, Tunnel, Mixed, HTTP, Tun)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: adongwanai/AgentGuide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/adongwanai/AgentGuide
Language: html
https://adongwanai.github.io/AgentGuide | AI Agent开发指南 | LangGraph实战 | 高级RAG | 转行大模型 | 大模型面试 | 算法工程师 | 面试题库 | 强化学习｜数据合成

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sinavm/sinavm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sinavm/sinavm
Language: html
مواقعی که اینترنت ملی و محدود است، بدون نیاز به وی پی ان می‌توانید به محتوای کانال‌ها و کانفیگ‌های فیلترشکن دسترسی پیدا کنید

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tabler/tabler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tabler/tabler
Language: html
Tabler is free and open-source HTML Dashboard UI Kit built on Bootstrap

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trycua/cua
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trycua/cua
Language: html
Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).
